title: Gear Aid ReviveX Spray On Waterproofing Footware Protection Outdoor Rec - 4 oz
description:
Get prepared for the unpredictable spring weather by waterproofing your footwear and gloves. This protectant works with nubuck, suede, fabric and leather materials; Revivex will not soften your leather! Note: these leather materials must be using GORE-TEX fabric, eVEnt, and other waterproof-breathable technologies.

Gear Aid ReviveX Spray On Waterproofing Footware Protection Outdoor Rec - 4 oz

Get prepared for the unpredictable spring weather by waterproofing your footwear and gloves. This protectant works with nubuck, suede, fabric and leather materials; Revivex will not soften your leather!

Key Features

  • Suede
  • Imported
  • Reduce wear, protect shoes and boots from the elements and keep them looking good as new with this suede and fabric water repellent
  • PFAS-free with zero fluorocarbons, this formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable footwear fabrics such as nubuck, leather, canvas, and GORE-TEX
  • Maximize breathability of waterproof-breathable shoes to keep your feet feeling cool and dry; available in 4 fl oz bottle

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 36296
  • UPC: 021563362695
  • Color: Standard
  • Size: 1-Pack

Note: these leather materials must be using GORE-TEX fabric, eVEnt, and other waterproof-breathable technologies.
